# Frequently Asked Questions

## Is this an autonomous AI agent?

No. It is a dashboard for defining projects and proposals, reviewing decisions, routing work, and recording outcomes. External workers perform any execution.

## Does the dashboard call paid LLM providers?

No. It stores local operational records and writes trigger files. External workers may be configured separately to invoke providers.

## Are project recommendations generated by AI?

Immediate suggestions are local, deterministic recommendations derived from proposal status and pending decisions. The project action **Ask worker for recommendations** submits a real planning proposal for external AI-assisted processing.

## Why does a new proposal say Waiting for worker?

Because saving a proposal does not prove that a worker has picked it up. A worker or integration can explicitly change state when processing begins.

## Can I explore without triggering a worker?

Yes. Select **Try demo** from the Proposals page. Demo records are labeled and removable, and they do not write live execution triggers.

## Where is data stored?

In SQLite at `$HERMES_HOME/proposals.db`. If unset, `$HERMES_HOME` defaults to `~/.hermes`.

## Can existing proposal clients still use the API?

Yes. `POST /api/proposals` remains JSON-compatible, established URL paths remain supported, and the historic `board` field acts as a project compatibility key.

## What route is used for the hosted deployment?

The configured route is [https://reidar.tech/proposals](https://reidar.tech/proposals).

## Which executors can proposals target?

Native Hermes plus configured Codex CLI, Claude Code, OpenCode, Antigravity, Command Code, and Kilo Code delegates.

## How are costs tracked?

Cost and budget records are manual or integration-supplied operational records. They are not inferred from provider billing automatically.

## How do I contribute?

Start with [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md). Keep the proposal-first vocabulary, execution boundary, API compatibility, and safety controls intact.
